summary: Frontend testing of Session 2 features: Login, Register, Results, Portal with Framer Motion animations. Full flow tested: questionnaire (7 steps) → register → results → portal-link → portal.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Full flow tested: questionnaire (7 steps with correct testids: diagnosis-confirmed, hormonal-natural_period, last-period-input, pain-cramps_localized, goal-reduce_pain, commitment-very_committed, btn-next, btn-submit) → /register (phenotype banner green FOUND, password strength Fuerte with 5/5 rules passing) → /results (headerBadge 'Evaluación completada' FOUND, 3 animated barFills, booking-btn, portal-link, ctaIconTop all FOUND) → /portal (greeting 'Hola, Maria 👋', 5 pillar cards, 13 habit checkboxes, habit SVG check animates on click, score card with circularChart, 3 widget icons, widget-agendar/diario/compartir all FOUND).
